name: Gosht Biryani (Rice Layered with Meat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the milk and saffron and keep aside.
2. Mix the next 8 items and marinade the lamb in it for 4 to 6 hours.
3. Gently simmer the marinated lamb for 45 minutes in a heavy pan.
4. Meanwhile, wash the rice and cook with whole spices in boiling water until the grains are about a quarter done. Drain.
5. Grease the base of a heavy pan and place half the cooked rice in an even but loose layer.
6. Spread the cooked meat mixture (with juices) over the rice.
7. Spread the remaining cooked rice over this in a loose, neat layer.
8. Pour the saffron milk over the rice at random spots.
9. Pour ghee over the rice.
10. Grease a circular piece of foil (the size of the pan) and place it greased side down on top of the rice.
11. Cover the pan and cook on low to medium heat for about 20 minutes, or until the rice is fluffy.
12. Gently toss the rice and meat together before serving.
